task_completion.description: Agent executes a Python script from the analysis_scripts directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal window shows a command invoking python on a script located in or referenced from '~/Documents/analysis_scripts/'.

task_completion.description: A hydrograph plot is generated and visible on the screen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An image viewer, Matplotlib window, or similar application is open displaying a line graph.

task_completion.description: The plot correctly displays water surface elevation over time.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The y-axis is labeled with 'Water Surface Elevation', 'WSE', 'Elevation', or similar, and the x-axis is labeled with 'Time', dates, or time steps.

task_completion.description: The plot represents data for a computational cell.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The plot title, legend, or annotations explicitly mention a specific 'cell', 'cell ID', or 'computational cell'.

task_completion.description: The plot is saved as a PNG file in the hec_ras_results directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output confirms the save, an 'ls' command shows the '.png' file in '~/Documents/hec_ras_results/', or a file manager window shows the PNG file in that specific folder.

integrity.description: The terminal shows genuine execution of the Python script rather than spoofed output.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal shows standard Python execution commands and realistic output or processing delays, not just 'echo' commands or a text editor made to look like terminal output.

integrity.description: The agent did not download a pre-existing hydrograph image from the internet.
integrity.visual_evidence: No web browser is open to an image search engine or displaying downloaded stock hydrograph images.

integrity.description: The plot appears to be generated by a Python visualization library.
integrity.visual_evidence: The plot has standard Matplotlib, Seaborn, or Plotly styling (e.g., standard fonts, axes, and toolbars if in a GUI window) rather than looking like a copied photograph or textbook diagram.
